{{Quote|All fighters, regroup and return to the ''Yavaris''. Prepare to retreat. We are leaving the Maw. We have everything we came for.|Wedge Antillies|<ref name="COTF" />}}
The '''''Yavaris''''' was an [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|escort frigate]] in the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Alliance Fleet]] and [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Navy]]. When the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] attacked [[Maw Installation]], it served as the [[Command ship/Legends|command ship]] for [[General/Legends|General]] [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]]. During the [[Darksaber (superweapon)|''Darksaber'']] crisis, it was, once again, Antilles's [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]], and served by the science officer [[Qwi Xux]]. Its escort fleet included six [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvettes]] and the [[Dodonna (Assault Frigate)|''Dodonna'']].

==History==
{{Quote|Chewbacca, please do stop showing off! We need to get back to the ''Yavaris''.|C-3PO to Chewbacca|<ref name="COTF" />}}
[[File:Yavaris.png|thumb|left|The ''Yavaris'']]
It is unknown how the Yavaris entered into the service of the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Alliance Fleet]] but it was prior to [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]]. The [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|escort frigate]] would later gather with the rest of the Fleet at Sullust prior to the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|assault]] on the [[Death Star II/Legends|Second Death Star]]. Somehow the Yavaris had survived the battle and most of the war to serve in the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Navy]].

In [[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]], the ship would later be under the command of [[General/Legends|General]] [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]], who was in command of the attack on the [[Maw Installation]] with four [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvettes]] in order to gain the secrets there as well as capture the scientist that had been hidden in the [[Maw Cluster/Legends|Maw Cluster]] for the last decade after their [[Maw fleet|protection]] had left. During the assault, two corvettes were sent to attack it but due to the reveal of a new superweapon called an [[Metal-Crystal Phase Shifter|MCPS]] that destroyed one of them but the other corvette was able to knock out the station before firing another shot. The Yavaris would later engage the badly damaged [[Gorgon]] along with the two remaining corvettes along with X-wing, Y-wings and five [[Gamma-class assault shuttle/Legends|Gamma-class assault shuttles]] before it destroyed the Maw Installation and downloaded the schematics of the superweapons that were in development there.

[[12 ABY/Legends|A year later]], the Yavaris would do a mock New Republic war game, once more it served as Antilles's [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] while [[Qwi Xux]] served as science officer. The escort frigate would be joined by the [[Assault Frigate Mark I|Assault Frigate]] [[Dodonna (Assault Frigate)|''Dodonna'']] and six [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvettes]] against [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Gial Ackbar's]] task force consisting of his flagship the [[MC90 Star Cruiser]] ''[[Galactic Voyager]]'' and four [[DP20 gunship/Legends|Corellian gunships]] over Nal Hutta to scare the Hutts. Antilles would win the combat exercise by using a tactic devised and named after the esteemed [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]], the [[Ackbar Slash/Legends|Ackbar Slash]] allowing his ships to cut through Ackbar's forces and have the ''Galactic Voyager'' along with all gunships "destroyed" while only two CR90 corvettes were "destroyed" on his side. Before another mock battle could be done they were sent to intercept the [[Darksaber (superweapon)|Darksaber]] and save [[General/Legends|General]] [[Crix Madine/Legends|Crix Madine]] but failed to save the General in time.
